TestCase z22Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data, t1.data, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data = follow_case_data;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: need at least 2 elements to sort a subarray
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Generate two random indices within the array bounds
    int idx1 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    int idx2 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (idx1 > idx2) {
        int tmp = idx1;
        idx1 = idx2;
        idx2 = tmp;
    }
    
    // Sort the subarray [idx1, idx2] in ascending order
    for (int i = idx1; i < idx2; ++i) {
        for (int j = i + 1; j <= idx2; ++j) {
            if (follow_case.data[i] > follow_case.data[j]) {
                double temp = follow_case.data[i];
                follow_case.data[i] = follow_case.data[j];
                follow_case.data[j] = temp;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
